---
title: "Alex Kim"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher"
image: /images/portraits/placeholder.svg
role: postdoc
weight: 2
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:alex@cornell.edu"
---

*(Example member — replace with a real lab member.)* Alex works on coupling
terrestrial lidar with demographic models to study forest carbon dynamics.
